similarity_threshold.description: Cosine similarity below which a new user input is flagged as a topic shift. Only used when an embeddings.provider is active.

keep_last_topic_full.description: When true (default), the most recent topic remains verbatim while older topics may be summarised by downstream plugins. Reserved for future use.

explicit_phrases.description: Lowercase substrings whose presence in a user input is treated as a topic shift signal.
